title: 1949–50 FK Partizan season - Wikipedia
body: Partizan 1949–50 football season Partizan 1949–50 season Head coach Illés Spitz Yugoslav First League 3rd Yugoslav Cup Semi-finals ← 1948–49 1950–51 → The 1949–50 season was the fourth season in FK Partizan 's existence. This article shows player statistics and matches that the club played during the 1949–50 season. [ 1 ] Players [ edit ] First 11 Šoštarić , Kolaković , Čolić , Čajkovski , Jovanović , Jakovetić , Mihajlović , Pajević , Valok , Bobek , Atanacković Other players Grčević, Petrović, Drenovac , Lazarević, Senčar , Simonovski , Požega, Marjanović, Radunović, Racić, Vorgić, Hočevar, Bogojevac, Krajišnik, Šijaković, Stipić, Stanković, Popović i Kantardžić.
